recommendations.title: Some Kind of Hate
recommendations.overview: When troubled teen Lincoln is subjected to severe bullying, he accidentally conjures the vengeful ghost of Moira Karp. Once a teenage girl pushed to suicide, Moira is now an unstoppable force on a mission of gruesome retribution. But when she goes to

recommendations.title: Archenemy
recommendations.overview: Max Fist claims he’s a hero from another dimension who has somehow landed on Earth and been stripped of his powers. Instead of treating him like a powerful champion, no one believes Max’s claims — except for a teenager named Hamster and his sister In

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Holidays
recommendations.overview: An anthology feature film that puts a uniquely dark and original spin on some of the most iconic and beloved holidays of all time by challenging our folklore, traditions and assumptions.
recommendations.director: Gary Shore, Adam Egypt Mortimer, Nicholas McCarthy, Kevin Smith, Kevin Kölsch, Scott Stewart, Anthony Scott Burns, Dennis Widmyer, Sarah Adina Smith

recommendations.title: Soul Survivors
recommendations.overview: A college freshman involved in a fatal car crash discovers she may not have survived after all when she becomes caught between the worlds of the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Memory: The Origins of Alien
recommendations.overview: The untold origin story behind Ridley Scott's Alien - rooted in Greek and Egyptian mythologies, underground comics, the art of Francis Bacon, and the dark visions of Dan O'Bannon and H.R. Giger. A contemplation on the symbiotic collaborative process

recommendations.title: Felon
recommendations.overview: A family man convicted of killing an intruder must cope with life afterward in the violent penal system.

recommendations.title: Less Than Zero
recommendations.overview: A college freshman returns to Los Angeles for Christmas at his ex-girlfriend's request, but discovers that his former best friend has an out-of-control drug habit.

recommendations.title: The Perfume of the Lady in Black
recommendations.overview: Sylvia, an industrial scientist, is troubled by strange hallucinations related to the tragic suicide of her mother.
